description_long: This is a four-tiered wooden shelf with a dark brown finish and visible wood grain texture. The structure features thick, rectangular shelves supported by vertical side panels, giving it a sturdy and robust appearance. Each shelf is open on all sides, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The design is simple and functional, with no visible doors, drawers, or decorative elements. The shelf stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it from the ground. Its overall look is utilitarian, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces.
description: A sturdy, four-tiered wooden shelf with a dark brown finish and open shelving, supported by thick side panels and short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four open shelves and the full width of the structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the supporting panels.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the open back and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the shelf depth and panel thickness.
